title: Handle Division and Edge Cases
user_story: As a user, I want to perform division operations with proper error handling, so that the calculator remains stable when dividing by zero or receiving invalid data.
acceptance_criteria: The interface includes an option for division.
Dividing any number by zero displays a clear 'Division by zero is not allowed' message.
Entering non-numeric characters (letters, symbols) triggers an input validation error.
The calculator does not crash or freeze when invalid inputs are submitted.
